steps.title: Find the original intercept
steps.content:
Set $x=0$ in the original equation to find the original $y$-intercept:
$$10(0)+20y=160$$
$$20y=160$$
$$y=8$$

steps.title: Apply the downward shift
steps.content:
Shifting the line down $5$ units subtracts $5$ from every $y$-coordinate, including the intercept:
$$8-5=3$$

steps.title: Write the new intercept
steps.content: The resulting $y$-intercept is $(0,3)$. The answer is A.
